title: TIM - Run Enrichment For Domain Indicators
content:
This playbook processes indicators by enriching indicators based on the indicator feed's reputation, as specified in the playbook inputs. This playbook needs to be used with caution as it might use up the user enrichment integration's API license when running enrichment for large amounts of indicators.

Cortex XSOAR/XSIAM SOAR playbook from the Cortex XSOAR pack (TIM_Processing, xsoar-supported).

Use cases: Threat Intelligence Management.

Inputs — EnrichBadIndicators: Enter a value of true to enrich indicators whose reputation from the feed is bad.; EnrichGoodIndicators: Enter a value of true to enrich indicators whose reputation from the feed is good.; EnrichSuspiciousIndicators: Enter a value of true to enrich indicators whose reputation from the feed is suspicious.; EnrichUnknownIndicators: Enter a value of true to enrich indicators whose reputation from the feed is unknown..
